AppDescription.message: Elimina les barres negres dels vídeos en pantalles ultraamples (21:9, 32:9, etc.) a tot arreu, incloent YouTube, Netflix, Prime Video, etc.

ImproveUs.message: Si us plau, diga'ns com millorar per correu electrònic

Off.description: Name of the mode when the extension is disabled and doesn't apply any transformations

PrivacyPolicyText.message: Valorem la teva privadesa i respectem el RGPD de la UE. Si us plau, revisa i accepta la nostra política de privadesa per començar a utilitzar UltraWide Video.

ReviewUs.message: Si us plau, deixa una ressenya d'UltraWide Video a la Chrome Web Store

Stretch.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets stretched horizontally to fill the video element and remove black bars

Zoom.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets zoomed (scaled up, vertically and horizontally) to fill the video element and remove black bars
